backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types and shared functions for storing/retrieving chart analysis results, user profiles, and settings, with role-based access control for admin-only endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature (REQ-154) requiring per-slot clipboard paste activation in TimeframeUploadSlot and AnalyzeChart components, replacing a global paste listener.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of every component and page in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (Dashboard, AnalyzeChart, ProcessingScreen, Results, History, Settings) wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using a useCamera hook that supports start/stop/capture/switch actions with all UI text in Portuguese and error handling for permission, not-found, and unsupported scenarios.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based component that draws support/resistance lines and a directional arrow overlay on a chart image supplied as either a File or a URL string.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A drag-and-drop file upload component that accepts images up to 10MB, supporting click, drag, drop, and paste interactions with file preview and removal.
Renders a single analysis history entry as a clickable card showing signal direction (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, timestamp, and WIN/LOSS badge.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a router Outlet, a toast notification provider, and a footer with branding.
Displays a single processing step with an animated progress bar, percentage counter, and status icon (pending, active spinner, or completed checkmark).
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main trading signal card showing direction (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA), confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional signal strength indicator.
frontend/src/components/TimeframeSummary: A compact card showing signal, trend direction, and confidence for a single timeframe (M1/M3/M5) with color-coded styling and an optional highlighted state.
frontend/src/components/TimeframeUploadS: An image upload slot for a specific timeframe that supports drag-and-drop, file picker, clipboard paste, and camera capture, with image preview and replacement.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Empty configuration file, likely intended to hold API endpoint or environment settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme management, persisting the selected theme to localStorage and applying it as a class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, exposing the captured image and any permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: Custom hook that implements a countdown timer from a given number of seconds, returning formatted time remaining, a finished flag, and raw seconds left.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMultiTimeframeUplo: Custom hook managing file upload state for up to three chart timeframe slots (M1, M3, M5), providing helpers to set, clear, and query filled slots.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries, exposing a unified interface for reading and updating user settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines light and dark CSS custom property themes, and adds styles for processing bars, range inputs, and touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for uploading up to three multi-timeframe chart images, converting them to data URLs stored in sessionStorage, and navigating to the processing page.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app header, AI status indicator, and navigation buttons to Analyze, History, and Settings pages, along with feature highlight cards.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: History page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using a query hook, showing a loading spinner or empty state with a prompt to analyze a chart.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Processing screen that reads chart images from sessionStorage, runs multi-timeframe local candle analysis through staged steps with progress indicators, then navigates to the results page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page that reads a stored analysis from sessionStorage and displays the trading signal, confidence, trend, patterns, countdown timer, and win/loss feedback buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure default timeframe, AI sensitivity, daily operation limit, and notifications, persisting values to both localStorage and the backend.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side image analysis service that scans chart image pixel data to detect bullish/bearish candle columns, support/resistance levels, and candlestick patterns, returning a structured LocalAnalysisResult.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the local candle analysis result (`LocalAnalysisResult`) and multi-timeframe breakdown entries (`MultiTimeframeEntry`), covering fields like signal, trend, confidence, patterns, probabilities, support/resistance levels, and timeframe.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for external API chart analysis responses (`ApiAnalysisResponse`) and API errors (`ApiError`), with detailed JSDoc describing the 6-step rule-based technical analysis process the API must implement.
frontend/src/utils/dataUrlToFile.ts: Converts a base64 data URL string into a `File` object, handling MIME type extraction and binary decoding; returns `null` for invalid, empty, or malformed inputs without throwing.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date-time string (e.g., '5 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Defines the serializable `AnalysisResult` interface used by the Results page and provides `mapLocalAnalysisResult` to convert a `LocalAnalysisResult` into that plain object shape.
frontend/src/utils/mergeMultiTimeframeRe: Merges an array of per-timeframe `LocalAnalysisResult` objects into a single `AnalysisResult`; for multiple results, selects the highest-confidence result as primary and attaches all results in a `multiTimeframe` array.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Shares a formatted Portuguese analysis summary using the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy (or legacy `execCommand`) if sharing is unavailable.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/border-radius values, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 65) describing Advance Signal Pro's architecture, existing features, and known issues including analysis errors, save failures, and timeframe selector bugs.
